{{util.appTranslate('order_details')}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_order_id')}}: {{util.refId(id) | uppercase}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_order_date')}}: {{orderDateTime}}
{{util.appTranslate('restaurant')}}: {{restaurantName}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_customer')}}: {{userName}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_payment')}}: {{paymentName}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_grand_total')}}: {{util.priceFormat(grandTotal)}}
{{util.appTranslate('order_status')}}: {{ util.appTranslate(orderStatus) }}
{{util.appTranslate('delivery_type')}}: {{ deliveryType == 'homedelivery' ? util.appTranslate('home_delivery'):util.appTranslate('self_pickup') }}
{{util.appTranslate('th_id')}} {{ util.refId(element.id) | uppercase }} {{util.appTranslate('th_details')}}
{{ element.displayName }}
{{element.optionName}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_quantity')}} {{element.quantity}} {{util.appTranslate('th_price')}} {{util.priceFormat(element.totalPrice)}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_item_total')}} : +{{util.priceFormat(realTotal)}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_item_discount')}} : -{{util.priceFormat(itemDiscount)}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_sub_total')}} : +{{util.priceFormat(itemTotal)}}
@if (foodServiceCharge > 0) {
{{util.appTranslate('th_food_service_charge')}} : +{{util.priceFormat(foodServiceCharge)}}
} @if (serviceCharge > 0) {
{{util.appTranslate('service_charge')}} : +{{util.priceFormat(serviceCharge)}}
} @if (extraCharge > 0) {
{{util.appTranslate('th_extra_service_charge')}} : +{{util.priceFormat(extraCharge)}}
} @if (deliveryCharge > 0) {
{{util.appTranslate('th_delivery_charge')}} : +{{util.priceFormat(deliveryCharge)}}
} @if (deliveryTip > 0) {
{{util.appTranslate('th_delivery_tip')}} : +{{util.priceFormat(deliveryTip)}}
} @if (packageCharge > 0) {
{{util.appTranslate('packaging_charge')}} : +{{util.priceFormat(packageCharge)}}
} @if (packageChargeTax > 0) {
{{util.appTranslate('packaging_charge_tax')}} : +{{util.priceFormat(packageChargeTax)}}
} @if (couponDiscountCharge > 0) {
{{util.appTranslate('th_discount')}} : - {{util.priceFormat(couponDiscountCharge)}}
} @if (cookingInstruction != '') {
{{util.appTranslate('cooking_instruction')}}: {{cookingInstruction}}
} @if (deliveryInstructionInfo != '') {
{{util.appTranslate('delivery_instruction')}}: {{deliveryInstructionInfo}}
}

{{util.appTranslate('th_grand_total')}}: {{util.priceFormat(grandTotal)}}

{{util.appTranslate('th_action')}}
{{util.appTranslate('th_order_date')}}
:
{{orderDateTime}}
{{util.appTranslate('order_type')}}
:
{{orderType}}
{{util.appTranslate('delivery_type')}}
:
{{ deliveryType == 'homedelivery' ? util.appTranslate('home_delivery'):util.appTranslate('self_pickup') }}
@if (orderStatus == 'created' && isInstantOrder == true) {
{{util.appTranslate('set_preparing_time')}}
} @if (orderStatus == 'accepted' && isInstantOrder == false) {
{{util.appTranslate('set_preparing_time')}}
} @if (orderStatus == 'created' && isInstantOrder == true) {
} @if (orderStatus == 'accepted' && isInstantOrder == false) {
} @if (orderStatus == 'created') {
@if (restaurantCanCancelOrder) { }
} @if (orderStatus == 'accepted') {
} @if (orderStatus == 'preparing') {
@if (driverId =='' && deliveryType == 'homedelivery') {
{{nearDeliveryman}} {{util.appTranslate('rider_nearby_assign_soon')}}
} @if (driverId != '' && deliveryType == 'homedelivery') {
{{ driverName }}
{{util.appTranslate('deliveryman_waiting_for_order_ready')}}
} @if (deliveryType == 'selfpickup') {
{{ userName }}
{{util.appTranslate('customer_waiting_for_order_ready')}}
}
} @if (orderStatus == 'ready') {
@if (driverId =='' && deliveryType == 'homedelivery') { } @if (driverId !='' && deliveryType == 'homedelivery') { } @if (deliveryType == 'selfpickup') { }
} {{util.appTranslate('customer_details')}}

{{userName}} {{ userRole =='guest' ? '(' + util.appTranslate('dd_guest') + ')':'' }}

{{ userEmail }}
{{util.appTranslate('mobile_number')}} {{ userMobile }}
@if (deliveryType == 'homedelivery') {
{{util.appTranslate('receiver_name')}} : {{receiverName}}
{{util.appTranslate('receiver_contact_number')}}: {{ receiverMobile }}
} @if (deliveryType == 'homedelivery') {
{{util.appTranslate('delivery')}} : {{deliveryAddress}}
} @if (deliveryType != 'homedelivery') {
{{util.appTranslate('delivery')}} : {{util.appTranslate('self_pickup')}}
}

@if (deliveryType == 'homedelivery' && driverId !='') { {{util.appTranslate('deliveryman_information')}}

{{driverName}} {{ driverRole == 'vendorDriver' ? '('+ util.appTranslate('vendor_deliveryman') +')':'' }}

{{ driverEmail }}
